import json
import re

# Read the notebook
with open\("Log4/outputs/gnss_quality_analysis_ref_Log4.ipynb", "r"\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

print\(f"Total cells: {len\(nb['cells']\)}\\n"\)

# Extract device info from first few cells
for i, cell in enumerate\(nb['cells'][:10]\):
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
        source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
        if 'DEVICE' in source or 'GNSS' in source or 'LOG' in source:
            print\(f"=== CELL {i} \(CODE\) ==="\)
            print\(source[:500]\)
            print\(\)
    elif cell['cell_type'] == 'markdown':
        source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
        print\(f"=== CELL {i} \(MARKDOWN\) ==="\)
        print\(source\)
        print\(\)

import json
import re

# Read the notebook
with open\("C:\\\\Users\\\\Arkajyoti\\\\Downloads\\\\GoogleGNSSLogger_LogAnalysis\\\\Log4\\\\outputs\\\\gnss_quality_analysis_ref_Log4.ipynb", "r"\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

print\(f"Total cells: {len\(nb['cells']\)}\\n"\)

# Extract first 15 cells to see structure
for i in range\(min\(15, len\(nb['cells']\)\)\):
    cell = nb['cells'][i]
    print\(f"\\n=== CELL {i} \({cell['cell_type']}\) ==="\)
    source = ''.join\(cell['source']\) if isinstance\(cell['source'], list\) else cell['source']
    print\(source[:300]\)
